rationale: In the citing paper, van Heerde et al. (2000) appears only as one entry in Table 2, where the authors compile examples of how prior studies phrased elasticity decomposition interpretations. The 2003 paper does not use that 2000 paper's store-level dip model, estimation approach, or specific results to build its own derivations or empirical analyses. Its main contribution is a new elasticity-to-unit-sales transformation and related evidence, so this citation serves as a background illustrative mention rather than a distinct intellectual basis.
